_comment: The 'claudebase' binary is installed at this absolute path by the install.sh / install.ps1 scripts at the root of this repo. It is NOT bundled with the github-sourced plugin (target/ is gitignored). Run `bash install.sh` (Unix) or `pwsh install.ps1` (Windows) once before launching the plugin for the first time. ${HOME} is expanded by Claude Code's MCP server launcher.
